7/25/03	Kelseyville, California, Konocti Harbor Resort & Spa, Amphitheatre	


Same problem described for the Lb 1099:pop d2t1 3:00 
Good recording

CD1

1 Tombstone Blues (Bob on piano), 2 I Don't Believe You (She Acts Like We Never Have Met) (Bob on piano and harp), 3 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 4 Make You Feel My Love (Bob on piano), 5 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano), 6 Most Likely You Go Your Way (And I'll Go Mine) (Bob on piano and harp), 7 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic) (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on cittern), 8 Cold Irons Bound (Bob on piano), 9 It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic) (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on cittern), 10 Dignity (Bob on piano),

CD2

1 Every Grain Of Sand (Bob on piano and harp), 2 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar), 3 Moonlight (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 4 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), (encore), 5 Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano), 6 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano and harp)
